comment: 26yo female, 10 years post-completion of pediatric Hodgkin lymphoma curative-intent therapy (ABVD x 6 cycles, cumulative doxorubicin ~300 mg/m², no chest RT). No personal cancer recurrence, no current heart failure. Engine fires RF-IATROGENIC-ANTHRACYCLINE-LATE-CARDIO-PREVENTION (anthracycline >=250 mg/m² + >=5y post-treatment + pediatric exposure cohort — COG-LTFU surveillance bin) → routes to PreventionPlan: standard = late-effects cardio surveillance (echocardiogram + GLS q2-5y per COG-LTFU + ASCO Cardio-Oncology Survivorship + ESC 2022 Cardio-Oncology, biomarkers BNP/troponin selectively, BP/lipid/glucose optimization); aggressive = annual echocardiogram + cardio-oncology referral with early ARB/beta-blocker initiation on subclinical LV dysfunction. Validates v0.3 iatrogenic survivor late-effects pilot. Anchored DIS-AML.
